Class DashboardScreen

java.lang.Object
ui.BaseScreen
ui.DashboardScreen
public class DashboardScreen extends BaseScreen
Main dashboard screen showing spending summary, daily limit gauge, and a category breakdown pie chart.

Layout is split into two halves: the left shows the pie chart and the right shows the gauge with a "Log expense" button.

    Field
    Description

    Label displaying the overall budget status text.

    Label displaying the calculated daily spending limit.

    Circular gauge visualising today's spending against the daily limit.

    logExpenseBtn

    Font size for the screen subtitle label.

    Navigates to the expense logging screen.

    Clears and repopulates the pie chart dataset from the current cycle's expenses, grouped by category.

      protected void initComponents()
      Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.). Called before BaseScreen.initLayout().

      initComponents in class BaseScreen

      Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy. Called after BaseScreen.initComponents().

      initLayout in class BaseScreen

    • createPieChart

      private org.jfree.chart.ChartPanel createPieChart()
      Configures and returns the pie chart wrapped in a fixed-size ChartPanel.
      Returns:
      the styled chart panel

    • refreshPieChart

      private void refreshPieChart()
      Clears and repopulates the pie chart dataset from the current cycle's expenses, grouped by category.

    • loadDashboardData

      public void loadDashboardData()
      Loads and refreshes all dashboard data: total spent, daily limit, today's gauge fill, and the pie chart.

    • onLogExpenseClicked

      private void onLogExpenseClicked()
      Navigates to the expense logging screen.

    • updateDailyLimit

      public void updateDailyLimit(double limit)
      Updates the daily limit label text.
      Parameters:
      limit - new daily limit value in EGP

    • showBudgetWarning

      public void showBudgetWarning(String message)
      Shows a warning dialog with a budget alert message.
      Parameters:
      message - the warning text to display

    • navigateToExpenseLogging
